name.description: Name of the merchant that the item was purchased from.

categoryCode.description: A four-digit number listed in ISO 18245 for retail financial services. MCC is used to classify the business by the type of goods or services it provides.

orderAvailabilityDateTime.description: The earliest date an Issuer can search for orders (i.e. the date an Issuer cannot search before). Date-Time must be in [ISO 8601 format](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339#section-5.6)

orderHistoryMonths.description: The number of months worth of data you have made available to search on.

orderLatencyDays.description: The numbers of days that need to elapse between an authorization for a purchase and when the purchase can be searched on.

industryCode.description: Industry Code is used to classify the business by the type of industry.
